name: Roasted Cornish Hens
recipeIngredient: 1 branch fresh rosemary OR 2 tsp dried rosemary
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Pat the hens dry with a cloth. Slice lemon in half and squeeze juice into a medium bowl. Stuff hen cavities with half lemon, 2 cloves garlic, and 1/2 branch of fresh rosemary. Add honey, olive oil, salt, and pepper to lemon juice and blend together. Baste the hens with the lemon honey sauce. Place in a small roasting pan and roast for 20 minutes. Reduce heat and continue roasting for 20-30 minutes, basting occasionally. Roast until juices run clear from thigh. Transfer hens to cutting board and let sit for 10 minutes. Place roasting pan on stove burner and stir in white wine. Bring to a simmer and scrape brown bits from bottom of pan. Stir in chicken stock and simmer. Serve hens hot with sauce.
